docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00- SERVED NOV-29-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, JOYCELYN
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY JOYCELYN DIAZ IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO JAN-29-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MISERAY, AVELINO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIAZ, JOYCELYN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-29-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF AVELINO MISERAY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOYCELYN DIAZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MISERAY, AVELINO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DIAZ, JOYCELYN PLAINTIFF AVELINO MISERAY FAILED TO PROVE HIS CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MISERAY, AVELINO AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, JOYCELYN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2019 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-17-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-17-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF AVELINO MISERAY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOYCELYN DIAZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DIAZ, JOYCELYN HEARING SET FOR JAN-29-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2020 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
